title: Ransomware Attack Shuts Down Mills of Australia’s Second-Largest Sugar Producer
desc:

title: FBI, Google Dismantle ‘Outsider Enterprise’ Phishing Service
desc: The platform used more than 9,000 phishing sites, stealing nearly 4 million credit cards and causing roughly $1.9 billion in losses.
